REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-14-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. DEC-07-2004 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
